buyerMessages.subject: Inspiration by Cathay: 72 hours in Hong Kong
buyerMessages.bodyText: Email Preview https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=RVCtQeWkllhYrGcnAlyOa1sPDZ0A5PWX4hip62dpJSY&e= Can't see this email? View in browser https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=gidzyNlus9sEE4l4p4IInG-jDJseSlGHF0jKlCbEG7c&e= Dear Mr Eric Membership No : 187 XXXX 028 Inspiration by Cathay Unmissable stories, delicious adventures, amazing discoveries https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=k1Od6yIThq_zBRABXminGpPKR-UmqJiZKi_YFoLZZYw&e= 20 February 2026 Welcome back to Inspiration by Cathay: a curated selection of stories to inspire your next adventure. Welcome the Lunar New Year with new perspectives and new places. Discover where to travel in 2026, explore Hong Kong in 72 hours, and be among the first to experience the world’s newest hotel openings – boutique gems and iconic reopenings alike. A fresh year of travel and taste begins below. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=4Xl8gVoksgzsRIIWs5kxp_WNcpZC2QMW4tU2YKFHUSg&e= Hong Kong How to spend 72 hours in Hong Kong Visiting Hong Kong for 72 hours? We break down how to make the most of your trip day by day, covering iconic landmarks like the Star Ferry, easy hikes with panoramic views and the buzziest dim sum restaurants and cocktail bars. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=RJClUu6SClsNr3Bejyzl0FwLWfjD54JN84EKylc6Zi8&e= Read the guide https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=0wD_7evrt4FHNDKHw8ZJSYIQ8u6QhwaHFDDtJjh_mN8&e= Holidays The best 2026 hotel openings Be one of the first through the doors at these stunning hotels. Historical Penang shophouses, a Four Seasons scuba paradise, and grand dames reinvented for the modern traveller. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=UUdfsj9LnG8wlFdsEBUHvnXhbgWCOpEq8BZfxGgfhJQ&e= Book your stay https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=a-l2PE61jD-Wxn0oY9xqEZotKzTaFpKkxV1yDDVoNx8&e= Greater Bay Area What to do in Shenzhen at night Night owls, Shenzhen is your next pit stop. Karaoke bars, 24/7 spas, night markets and a gigantic theme park – here’s what to do when the sun goes down. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=XttzWzLea78hyRKSNZfYxzGjLpif5U31Q-NVQlu4kRk&e= Plan your night out https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=L1dMTyZBpQs8YMR4yDEuquQaBHGIy5IFc-LsBNCYfrA&e= Cathay Stories Discover our revived historic uniforms Hermes. Balmain. Nina Ricci. These are just a few of the designers who’ve crafted on our iconic uniforms: and for Cathay's 80th anniversary, we’ve dipped into the archives for a closer look. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=M63tcqIRbrpDkgroqtUKu6V-vUsDndToYpzfm9OQYH4&e= See the evolution https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=xBXlZmMI0PxwMND2QpQzQUEKPEl_ciTcW8su4X5kLFE&e= Travel The 7 best places to travel in the world – and why Looking for a new destination to set your heart aflutter? Here are the top places in the world to visit this year, from sun-soaked European getaways to historic Chinese Mainland cities. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=yZ49be3w8DTIC99eFgTKn1H76gv6m3uVm2xWFbYcPU8&e= Plan your next big trip https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=SrXRtvQaTVKyK1xvh_ktWwsd3Rl4FyupmpR8upnl4zk&e= Travel Unconventional Lunar New Year celebrations Think of Lunar New Year and you’ll imagine the classics: red packets, lion dances and loud celebrations. We dive into the places with another take on tradition, turning to motorcycle races and full moon kayaking. https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.e.cathaypacific.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=dl3Nkmjc3k8Ghy9L-c5dxz0nI7BTSxaIQ1eb6b7S6F6YAe6W8VG-S4WSgo-oR8wF&s=4VbcknfuJcPcIfQQLUYmCohfQZcuNWfMIKli6GQiVkc&e= Here’s how people celebrated Discover even more inspiration online Whether you're planning your next getaway simply dreaming of future travels, you'll find plenty of stories to fuel your wanderlust on our Inspiration hub. ISSUE 28

[Artifact Insider, Issue 19](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_z_7h267w2z0o6v04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D11&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=JY8lA_O_Y3feqfBVMHK8gsx7SsqwsS2m3DB-HjllUgg&e= )

 

ISSUE 28

Artifact Insider

 
 

Here we are at the tail end of February. Poof, the first of the year has passed—the anticipation, the fresh starts, the romanticization of winter are all fading. In our book, this time that teeters between winter’s end and spring’s return is the true new year. The cold, short days of January and February are made for stillness and reflection, and then March swings open the door for reinvigoration.

As we pause to look back before launching into a season of all things new, we are reminded of why we’re here. YOU. And all the moments that made up your year. The ways you chose to remember them are what made our year. If we could share them all, we would, but for now here are a few of our favorites to inspire you in the months ahead.

Memory Bowl

BY CRYSTAL C.

[Summer collage](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_z_7l217r2708ve04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D12&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=Xz9H_Xt2Kr14S49C8cu08E22L1K0muEbqS6xeIzH2q0&e= )

“Lately I’ve been trying to be more intentional about bringing my photos off my camera roll and into my home. It’s so easy to let memories pile up on our phones, unseen, but there’s something special about holding a print in your hands.

I recently discovered [Everyday Prints](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_web-2Donly_z_732u7t2q0pjs04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D13&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=CpxcQpDX5cX06vmZVbhZdrS6_z64pyDEbUJysJwtF3k&e= ) (pictured above in 3.25x3.25”) and decided to gather some of my favorite photos in a simple ceramic statement bowl. It feels like a creative twist on the traditional photo album—casual, interactive, and always within reach. It adds a personal, artful touch to your home. What I love most is that these aren’t just milestone photos—they’re everyday scenes: a sunset walk, the way light falls through the trees, cozy afternoons at home baking (and yes, endless cat photos). These little fragments of life deserve to be seen and celebrated, too.”

Meet Cute

BY BRI E.

[Film Camera](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_z_7j2o762f04tu04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D14&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=c9lObzUCWc-tQlPhiAjjQu_mlgPu54C-2NC8mqGBz6Y&e= )

“I wanted to start mixing wood tones in my bathroom to make it more cozy. So I created an arrangement of Walnut [Gallery Frames](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_web-2Donly_z_7h2z762k0pvw04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D15&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=OTAqFT5zq6v8xGGg40lAjE8ZJf_ncmF3zMtan_kR9bw&e= ) featuring vintage photos of Keeneland, and they made the perfect Father’s Day gift for my husband. It is a cute way to remember how we met and the memories we made together in college with something we can see every day.”

Cozy Corner

BY ABBEY T.

[Everyday Prints](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_z_7t2n7o2n0xud04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D16&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=RPqcznWFYQvaQkCSZEt6O93xllxv8gXP1QYGsVt_aBg&e= )

“It is my favorite time of the year, which is when I get to reflect on the last one in the most satisfying way with a [Layflat Photo Album](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.artifactuprising.com_web-2Donly_z_7826722a0q6j04-3Fuid-3Dd6459cdf-2Dcbb4-2D43de-2D989e-2D73fd7a2d7613-26txnid-3D9d6f9891-2D27ae-2D4056-2D9cd2-2D23bf863d2658-26mid-3Ddc472f2a-2D2133-2D4633-2Dbbdb-2D375d67dea46c-26bsft-5Faaid-3D8421398c-2D32c8-2D420c-2Db7f3-2Dcdc271f254bc-26bsft-5Fek-3D2026-2D02-2D20T12-253A00-253A55Z-26bsft-5Fmime-5Ftype-3Dtext-26bsft-5Ftv-3D13-26bsft-5Flx-3D17&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=GIVNHCwzVM8Lsn8OTTOzb7DQexwcUxJWKtXGg0ImHmzF5UYjhD_yu_DQ_Llh12DT&s=EqHednpa6c8K5lreIzd3MP7NBcZLS-JZVoGgeZOnm1o&e= ). I was particularly excited to print this one in this beautiful Seamist linen color. My best tip to offer you? Literally just start.” We’re obsessed with the way Abby styled her album alongside a groovy candle and striped cushions. We’ll take our morning coffee here, please.

As always, thanks for being here! We can't wait to unveil what we've been cooking up for spring. Until then,
happy printing.

The A|U Creative Team

buyerMessages.subject: Last Chance to Register: Identifying emerging risk exposure in low-disclosure markets
buyerMessages.bodyText:
Tuesday, Feb. 24, 2026

9:00 a.m. EST ⋅ 2:00 pm. GMT

MSCI in Practice: Identifying emerging risk exposure in low-disclosure markets 

Virtual Platform

Financial institutions are facing growing exposure to emerging risks across loan books, underwriting portfolios, and investments — particularly in private markets and SMEs, where company-level disclosure is often limited or unavailable. These gaps can create blind spots, reducing comparability and making risk assessment and decision-making more complex.

MSCI’s On-Demand Solutions are designed to support the assessments of these challenges by enabling standardized, model-driven assessments of climate and sustainability-related risk exposure using typically limited company inputs, such as sector, geography, and size.

In this webinar, we will provide an update on the On-Demand Solutions, introduce newly launched and upcoming models, and walk through practical use cases across banks, insurers, asset managers, and general partners. 

												 

Key Takeaways
•Participants will be able to establish a baseline view of emerging risk exposure across loan books, underwriting portfolios, and investment portfolios

•Improve comparability across public and private assets

•Support screening, monitoring, and risk management workflows

Event details →

Event details →

Selkirk Shwack
By Matthew Tufts
“Everett and Tristan chuckled behind me as I pulled myself from the crevasse I’d plunged into up to my thighs. Sleep deprivation has a way of making poor choices seem funny, and we were 46 miles and 16 hours into a seriously questionable venture.”

[Read](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.patagonia.com_stories_sports_trail-2Drunning_the-2Dselkirk-2Dshwack_story-2D165082.html&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=qziaN5IatJxDsJc5Ny_jK7TW8w95vYYObeo_2Yiv_sKKAJwmwPC_9YUbAOPpGbGw&s=8CQKkc9yaRfo44zGTWKuLfXjnznltNBiPo4pujIye6s&e= )

Photos: (Top) Shaun Price: “I heard a loud pop and saw Eric go over the bars, but I initially thought he was fine because he hopped up with full mobility ... until the pain set in. He ended up not actually breaking anything, but he was sidelined for a few months.” SHAUN PRICE (Bottom) Tristan Kodors and Everett Craig get up close and personal with the Selkirks’ bountiful slide alder and devil’s club. British Columbia. MATTHEW TUFTS
[Earth is now our only shareholder. Read Yvon’s Letter](https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.patagonia.com_ownership_&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=qziaN5IatJxDsJc5Ny_jK7TW8w95vYYObeo_2Yiv_sKKAJwmwPC_9YUbAOPpGbGw&s=fp_XmSXKP9hs4nER6bwSQfnFJRxnEPJedzVoJoTs_Fo&e= )

The simple, yet powerful mechanics of revolvers and lever-action rifles make
them very desirable among many firearm owners.  Revolvers are easy to operate,
great for concealing and straightforward to maintain.  Lever-action rifles come
in a variety of calibers, styles and are just really fun to shoot!

buyerMessages.subject: Supply Lines Special: Court strikes down tariffs
buyerMessages.bodyText:
Trump lost his case at the Supreme Court. Here’s Bloomberg’s full coverage
 <https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_economics&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=w5tbpK1fM_qe-7XaVu3LcmpLA15ixMt_fugxsqX6EvI&e= >
As a subscriber to Balance of Power 
<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_account_newsletters_balance-2Dof-2Dpower&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=DflC4IMgJnb7LNwaV3Ja8LN9DMQ4VvimhcRkWMDtUMk&e= >, Economics 
Daily <https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_account_newsletters_new-2Deconomy-2Ddaily&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=6ehhYVgve8-7ojpyvjj4jRw8DAKWAOpGy6uG3Dqwt0g&e= > or 
Washington Edition <https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_account_newsletters_washington&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=S8noc_tGSV1oQQLcl2PauHKs4m0SjF68viemuuuMUTs&e= >, 
you’re getting this special edition of the Supply Lines newsletter with the 
latest on the US Supreme Court’s ruling to strike down President Donald Trump’s 
global tariffs. To continue receiving the Supply Lines newsletter,sign up here 
<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_account_newsletters_supply-2Dlines&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=hs4YfCaiiWfuplE63ItItBYukawHm1iIUPlmepPZuJU&e= >.

The US Supreme Court on Friday ruled against President Donald Trump’s use of 
emergency powers to impose so-called reciprocal tariffs.

The court’s 6-3 decision invalidates Trump’s “Liberation Day” tariffs and 
duties imposed on goods from dozens of countries, and could cut the US average 
effective tariff rate by more than half.

The justices did not address the extent to which importers are entitled to 
refunds, leaving it to a lower court to sort out those issues, which could 
total as much as $170 billion if fully allowed, according to Bloomberg 
Economics.

White House officials have said tariffs will remain in its economic arsenal, 
under different legal authorities.

“We’re thrilled. It’s a feeling of tremendous relief that we don’t have to 
manage the uncertainty of not knowing what the tariff rates will be.”

Eva St. Clair

Co-founder of e-commerce apparel company Princess Awesome

Princess Awesome is one of thousands of small companies that have sued to 
receive potential tariff refunds, unlike many larger companies.

Follow our live blog to stay up-to-date with the latest:

US Supreme Court Strikes Down Trump’s Global Tariffs
Read the live blog

Trump’s Global Tariffs Struck Down by US Supreme Court

The US Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s sweeping global 
tariffs, undercutting his signature economic policy and delivering his biggest 
legal defeat since he returned to the White House.
Read more 
<https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__www.bloomberg.com_news_articles_2026-2D02-2D20_trump-2Ds-2Dglobal-2Dtariffs-2Dstruck-2Ddown-2Dby-2Dus-2Dsupreme-2Dcourt&d=DwIFaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=lDGQHkH2hybz1j1GYbdEDw&m=w1-ookfB5BzELLcgnSNWWh6qRBkNFJ1Hhzs-4w3G66-DWs_T2sdpG97bgBDpKHGa&s=tDeEzhiPmmG9TH3svQVb0bx9quzgUFwuLWW3DI9mX4w&e= >
Tariff Ruling Kicks Off Messy Fight Over $170 Billion in Refunds

Tariff refunds for companies that paid tens of billions were left unresolved 
by the Supreme Court, which ruled on Friday that President Donald Trump didn’t 
have legal authority to impose the duties under an emergency law.

Review of the Week


https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__click.email.golfpass.com_-3Fqs--253D-253D&d=DwIDaQ&c=slrrB7dE8n7gBJbeO0g-IQ&r=_S84GRJ7pUA7O59BtgxQdO6tQQddyTPZLMtGQX-Ue_I&m=_q-oiNHnxZg-btysuaOB_pAmpVnDGIB6rFSP41hSA3aaFnqfZcM8va5H6DjokKu0&s=2X-x4MNAiZOUtD0128e4HJRDtinn01zjg4gLshGMT90&e=  

Steele Canyon Golf Course
Jamul, California


"We booked this course based on an online recommendation and am so glad we did! We played all 27 holes on a Saturday under perfect skies. The Vineyard course had some winds to contend with, but nothing crazy. Our group consisted of everything from a scratch golfer to my high handicap, and everyone loved the course! The scenery and views at this course are absolutely amazing! The Canyon and Ranch course wind through the hills with huge elevation changes. The course was in excellent condition and well kept. The staff was very friendly and offered up some great tips before we headed out. They also made some special accommodations for our group which was massively appreciated! We grabbed a quick lunch on our 2nd turn which was very good and reasonably priced. We are already planning on coming
 back to play again on our next west coast trip and cannot recommend this course enough! The whole experience at Steele Canyon was first class and amazing!" - GolfPass reviewer
